title: Crawfish — MVP roadmap
summary: Two-wave MVP build plan: Wave 1 local-first standalone Dash (platform dark), Wave 2 thin web platform sync layer, with per-task implementation contracts and Definition-of-Done.
scope: Claude Code SDK agent hire flow
org sync API (Postgres + Prisma on Neon/Vercel)
notes: Type forced by MANIFEST_TYPE=SPEC (authoritative); manifest_override=true. PRECEDENCE=1 stored. PREDATES MONOREPO PIVOT — references stale paths crawfish-web/, crawfish-dash/, crawfish-platform/ instead of active web/, desktop/dash/, cloud/platform/. SCOPE CONFLICTS with active ROADMAP.md: (1) Wave 1 asserts 'the platform is dark' / 'no platform, no auth, no backend' — active roadmap treats org-layer/platform as the thesis; (2) MVP hides Board/Sessions/Knowledge/Diagnoses dash surfaces (one-surface dash) which the long roadmap restores; (3) declares multi-cursor, billing, public session permalinks, org roles/ACL out of MVP. Document is also part-PRD (brand promise, success metric, day-by-day schedule, hard-cuts table) but per-task implementation contracts (file paths, API endpoints, schema fields, Tauri commands) dominate, consistent with SPEC. Source-path hash computed offline; available hashing tool absent so slug uniqueness relied upon to avoid collision.
